title: AI Engineer
summary: Move from maintaining traditional software systems to designing, building, evaluating, and deploying production-ready AI applications that you can confidently defend in an architecture review, appraisal, or interview.
features: Build production-ready LLM, RAG, and agentic AI applications
Work with OpenAI Agents SDK, LangGraph, CrewAI, Google ADK, and LangChain
Integrate AI with APIs, databases, enterprise applications, and existing workflows
Apply evaluation, guardrails, observability, LLMOps, MLOps, and deployment practices
Create a deployed AI system with architecture diagrams and a strong career case study
Get live mentorship, architecture reviews, project clinics, and implementation feedback

title: Forward Deployed Engineer
summary: Move from receiving fixed requirements to becoming the engineer customers trust to uncover the real problem, shape the right AI solution, and own delivery through production and adoption.
features: Run customer discovery and turn ambiguous requests into clear, high-value AI use cases
Map business workflows, stakeholders, constraints, risks, and measurable outcomes
Design, prototype, integrate, and deploy AI solutions in real customer environments
Combine AI Engineering depth with solution architecture and delivery ownership
Communicate trade-offs confidently with customers, executives, and engineering teams
Create a complete discovery-to-adoption case study with live delivery coaching

title: GenAI Architect
summary: Move from contributing to isolated AI projects to designing the enterprise platforms, standards, governance, and technical direction that help multiple teams build AI systems safely and at scale.
features: Design enterprise GenAI reference architectures and target-state AI platforms
Architect LLM platforms, enterprise RAG, agentic systems, and integration layers
Define security, governance, evaluation, guardrails, and production-readiness standards
Make defensible decisions across models, vendors, cost, latency, scale, and reliability
Design LLMOps, MLOps, observability, and operating models for multiple delivery teams
Create an enterprise AI architecture blueprint and defend it through live design reviews
